body.title: D-consult-hardening-2026-04-24
body.text:
# Decision rollup — D-consult-hardening-2026-04-24

**Closed at:** 2026-05-02T03:15:14.483701+00:00
**Ticket count:** 10 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-frame-push-side-effect-regression (S) — test_frame_push_does_not_flood_other_twm_categories deterministic fail — self.capabilities leakage  `done` — Investigated: test passes in full file (9/9), fails in isolation — classic shared-TWM-state, already covered by T-test-ordering-flakes and T-test-postgres-schema. NOT a real regression. More interesti
- T-pe-chain-preflight-timeout-misdiagnosis (S) — pe_chain preflight times out on full suite + misreads timeout as test failure  `done` — ops.run_tests + pe_test fallback: timeout 120s→300s. ops.run_tests returns '[run_tests] timeout' distinct from '[run_tests] error' on TimeoutExpired. pe_chain pre-flight classifies timeout marker as s
- T-pe-chain-description-cap-too-tight (S) — pe_chain truncates ticket description at 600/400 chars — cuts off structured fields  `done` — pe_chain.py: 4 description slice sites (pe_plan 857+875, pe_situate 1063, pe_hypothesize 1669) replaced with _DESC_CAP_REASONING=4000 and _DESC_CAP_FALLBACK=2000. Module-level docstring explains the m
- T-coherence-inhibitor-winnow-exemption (S) — Coherence inhibitor gates WINNOW-hint-dispatched LLM replies as habit output  `done` — main.py:6771-6789 — source_label for coherence inhibitor now gates 'habit:' on memory_type==PROCEDURAL. INTERPRETIVE winners (WINNOW_* hints) labeled 'llm_via_<id>' instead. suppress_incoherent's LLM-
- T-delete-memory-fk-cascade (S) — cortex.delete_memory doesn't cascade to memory_embeddings/blobs — NE merge loops + floods logs at MB/sec  `done` — cortex.delete_memory (cortex.py:3880) now deletes memory_embeddings + memory_blobs rows first, then memories — all in one _conn context. 3 tests pass (without-embedding, nonexistent, source-regression
- T-consult-multi-turn-follow-through (M) — Consult sessions follow through multi-turn — today every session closes at turn 1  `done` — ConsultSession now basket-persistent — first stuck event opens; different stuck_reasons on same basket re-use the session (multi-turn). Conclude runs at _pe_close + _pe_escalate. New consult_sessions_
- T-consult-confab-scan-wiring-verify (S) — Verify confab_scanner wiring in ConsultSession — 0/104 flags is suspicious  `done` — pe_chain autonomous: pass
- T-consult-log-test-mode-gate (S) — Gate consults.log behind IGOR_TEST_MODE — .test suffix for fixture traffic  `done` — pe_chain autonomous: pass
- T-consult-preflight-trigger-narrow (S) — Narrow 'pre-flight blocked (no recognizer)' consult trigger — unactionable hypotheses  `done` — Removed _maybe_consult_stuck(preflight_unrelated) from the no-recognizer-matched pre-flight branch. Post-heal failure path retains it. Test updated to assert absence. No brainstem edit needed.
- T-consult-confidence-threshold-raise (S) — Raise consult confidence threshold 0.3 → 0.55  `done` — Superseded by T-consult-confidence-gate (commit b5469f55) — ticket described 'raise 0.3 floor to 0.55' but no 0.3 constant existed; Akien clarified scope to 'add abort-on-low-confidence gate', shipped

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: unknown.
